title: Vue Transitions and Animations Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of the <Transition> component, its CSS-based class system, and list animations.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the built-in component in Vue for adding transitions to an element?
Does the <Transition> component add elements physically to the DOM?
options: No, it only manages adding/removing CSS classes at different stages.
Yes, it creates a new <div> as a wrapper.

questions.question: Which CSS class represents the initial state of an element's enter transition?
Which component should you use to animate multiple items in a list (e.g. from v-for)?
Transitions are triggered automatically when an element's visibility is changed using ________ or ________.
